title: github: remove buildah downstream action
body:
As we discussed as a team the workflow is not working for us as we do not pay enough attention to these PRs. So remove it to not spam the buildah for no reason.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: Internal tracking, for the record: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-4075

> Internal tracking, for the record: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-4075

Was that card deleted?  If not, access control isn't letting me see it, and I'm interested in following the discussion.

> > Internal tracking, for the record: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-4075
> 
> Was that card deleted? If not, access control isn't letting me see it, and I'm interested in following the discussion.

Because it is a private issue, I added your id there so you should be able to see it now.

Anyhow there is nothing special there other than them pointing out a potential problem in that workflow and since we have agreed prior to that that we do not find this workflow helpful I opted for the simple fix to remove it other as anything else seemed like a waste of our time.
